subcodes.first_line: O Letter Mim! Hearken unto My call and be not of the heedless. Say: Verily, the Bird of Eternity hath soared in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف المیم اسمع ندائی و لا تکن من الغافلین قل ان طیر البقا قد طار بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital
